hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.(js|ts|cjs|mjs|jsx|tsx|json|jsonc)$' | { read -r f; pnpm exec biome check --write --no-errors-on-unmatched --files-ignore-unknown=true "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true

echo 'Reminder: pnpm only. Biome for lint/format. Turborepo monorepo with FSD (apps/web, packages/pages, packages/widgets, packages/features, packages/entities, packages/shared/*). React Router v7 Framework Mode. Run commands from repo root.'
